title: Prunus susakensis

The family Rosaceae is a large and diverse group of plants commonly known as the rose family. properties: Prunus susakensis, also known as the Tibetan apricot, has been traditionally used in Tibetan medicine for its various therapeutic properties. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help in treating various health conditions. Its extracts are used to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation, due to its purported ability to regulate bowel movements.
